source: Work IQ — recent email, Teams & calendar (seeded snapshot)

items.subject: Year-end push
items.snippet: Board has approved a $50,000 challenge match for new and lapsed major gifts through Dec 31 — let's make sure our best lapsed donors hear about it personally.

items.title: Development team standup
items.snippet: Gift officers reported capacity to make ~25 personal asks before Dec 10; agreed to prioritize lapsed donors with $10K+ lifetime and High/Exceptional wealth ratings.

items.subject: Re: how did the spring program go?
items.snippet: Loved the impact report you sent in spring — would like to hear what's planned for next year before I decide on a gift.

items.subject: Securities gifts
items.snippet: Reminder: stock gifts need to be initiated by Dec 24 to settle before year-end — flag any major donor considering appreciated securities now.
